features.name: unpacked struct declaration and number assignment
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct type declaration with a number or constant assigned to a variable of that struct type
features.snippet: struct { int a; int b; } s; initial s = 5;

features.name: unpacked struct with dynamic member
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct that contains a dynamic type member such as a queue or dynamic array
features.snippet: struct { int a; int b[]; } s;

features.name: unpacked struct variable assignment
features.description: Code should include two unpacked struct variables where one is assigned to the other
features.snippet: struct { int x; } s1, s2; initial s2 = s1;
